'''Saheelindeel''' was an agricultural [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a backwater world inhabited by the [[Saheelindeeli]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of intelligent, green-furred primates.

The high festival on Saheelindeel was a time for tribal hunting rituals and harvest ceremonies, and recently began to incorporate farm machinery exhibits, [[Shockball/Legends|shock-ball]] matches, and airshows in an attempt to become more technologically sophisticated. The Saheelindeeli, led by a [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarch]], had an affinity for grandiose actions.

Above the planet, it was the place of one of many listening posts installed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in order to detect [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] presence after the evacuation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Although the post was far from Alliance territory, they were destroyed in order to divert the Empire from the actual location.

{{Planet-stub}}
